lifecycle.onInit: Primary setup point. Register capability listeners here.
lifecycle.onDeleted: MUST call super.onDeleted() for WiFi. Set _destroyed = true before cleanup.
lifecycle.onUninit: Async cleanup. Clear timers, intervals, connections. Call super.onUninit().
lifecycle.onSettings: Only triggered by user-initiated changes, NOT setSettings().

capabilities.setCapabilityValue: BANNED in async callbacks after device init. Triggers registered listeners.
capabilities.safeSetCapabilityValue: REQUIRED everywhere. Checks _destroyed flag before calling SDK.

flowCards.registerInDriver: Register flow cards in Driver.onInit(), not Device.onInit().
flowCards.getDeviceTriggerCard: Use this, not getTriggerCard() for device-specific triggers.
flowCards.noTitleFormatted: Never use titleFormatted with [[device]] - causes manual device selection bug.
flowCards.globalUniqueness: Flow card IDs must be globally unique across ALL drivers.

antiPatterns: Raw setCapabilityValue after destroy - use safeSetCapabilityValue
Blocking main thread in onInit - use async/await
UTF-16 JSON loading - use Buffer-based loading (JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(fpath)))
Missing super.onDeleted() in WiFi drivers - leaks TCP connections
Using deprecated HybridSwitchBase - use UnifiedSwitchBase instead
Missing positionInvert check on curtain/cover devices

wifi.superOnDeleted: MANDATORY in base class - leaks TCP connections without it
wifi.capabilityMapCache: Cache in onInit(), don't recompute per _onData()
wifi.commandTimeout: 10s timeout per command to prevent queue stall
wifi.ipSelfHealing: Dynamic IP resolution via UDP cache
wifi.circuitBreaker: Required on TuyaCloudAPI - 5 failures = open, 30s reset
wifi.connectionStateTracker: Track connection state with history, uptime stats, state persistence

zigbee.markAppCommand: Call before physical commands to prevent ghost presses
zigbee.multiDP: Use TuyaDPParser.parseMultiple() - never assume 1 frame = 1 DP
zigbee.smartDivisor: Check SmartDivisorManager for auto-detection - never assume 1:1
zigbee.retryWithBackoff: Use RetryWithBackoff.forDevice() for DP queries and ZCL reads

sdk3.title: safeSetCapabilityValue
sdk3.description: Always use safeSetCapabilityValue() in async callbacks. Checks _destroyed flag.

sdk3.title: super.onDeleted() WiFi
sdk3.description: WiFi devices MUST call await super.onDeleted() to prevent TCP leaks.

sdk3.title: Mixin Order
sdk3.description: PhysicalButtonMixin(VirtualButtonMixin(BaseClass)) - never reverse.

sdk3.title: Buffer-Based JSON
sdk3.description: Use JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(fpath)) without 'utf8' to avoid 2x memory.

sdk3.title: _destroyed Guard
sdk3.description: Check this._destroyed at the start of all async callbacks.

sdk3.title: No console.log in Drivers
sdk3.description: Use this.log()/this.error()/this.warn() - never console.log/error.

sdk3.title: UnifiedBatteryHandler
sdk3.description: Never use linear battery formulas. Always use UnifiedBatteryHandler.calculateFromVoltage().

sdk3.title: markAppCommand Before Physical
sdk3.description: Always call markAppCommand() before sending physical commands to prevent ghost presses.

sdk3.title: No titleFormatted [[device]]
sdk3.description: Never use titleFormatted with [[device]] in flow cards - causes manual device selection bug.

sdk3.title: Backlight String Values
sdk3.description: Backlight values must be strings: 'off', 'normal', 'inverted'. Never numeric.

sdk3.title: Settings Key Naming
sdk3.description: Use zb_model_id and zb_manufacturer_name (snake_case with zb_ prefix).

sdk3.title: Wildcard Fingerprints Forbidden
sdk3.description: Never use wildcard patterns like '_TZE200_*' in manufacturerName arrays.

sdk3.title: Import Paths from lib/tuya/
sdk3.description: Use correct import paths: require('../../lib/tuya/TuyaZigbeeDevice') not require('../../lib/TuyaZigbeeDevice').

sdk3.title: Fingerprint Matching Combined
sdk3.description: manufacturerName + productId COMBINED must match. Same mfr in multiple drivers is NORMAL if productId differs.

sdk3.title: Flow Card ID Uniqueness
sdk3.description: Pattern: {driver}_physical_gang{N}_{on|off}. Must be globally unique across ALL drivers.

sdk3.title: Multi-DP Frame Parsing
sdk3.description: Use TuyaDPParser.parseMultiple() - never assume one frame = one DP.

sdk3.title: Curtain Position Invert
sdk3.description: Some curtains report 0=open, 100=closed. Use positionInvert: true in cover profile.

sdk3.title: Smart Divisor Calibration
sdk3.description: Never assume 1:1 scaling. Check SmartDivisorManager for auto-detection.

sdk3.title: Centralised Converters
sdk3.description: Use ValueConverterRegistry: numeric(), enumMap(), boolean(), positionInvert() for DP transforms.

sdk3.title: TuyaQuirk for Device Fixes
sdk3.description: Use QuirkRegistry.applyAll(this) for device-specific overrides.

sdk3.title: ErrorClassifier for Error Handling
sdk3.description: Use readAttrCatch() and classify() for structured error handling with retry logic.

sdk3.title: CapabilityMigrator for Updates
sdk3.description: Use migrateCapabilities() for driver update capability migrations.

sdk3.title: Circuit Breaker for APIs
sdk3.description: CircuitBreaker with 5-failure threshold, 30s reset for external API calls.

sdk3.title: CapabilityMapCache
sdk3.description: Cache capabilityMap in onInit() via CapabilityMapCache.warmup(). Invalidate on capability change.

sdk3.title: WiFi Smart Divisor Protocol
sdk3.description: WiFi devices MUST pass protocol: 'wifi' for correct divisor lookup.

sdk3.title: _destroyed Guard in All Async Callbacks
sdk3.description: Check this._destroyed at the start of all async callbacks and event handlers.

sdk3.title: Offline Command Queuing
sdk3.description: WiFi devices automatically queue commands when offline. Commands >5min dropped on reconnect.

sdk3.title: DPCache for Offline Fallback
sdk3.description: Per-device DP value cache with 5min TTL and LRU eviction.

sdk3.title: ErrorClassifier Retry Logic
sdk3.description: Use withRetry() for automatic retry with exponential backoff.

sdk3.title: Batch Capability Updates
sdk3.description: Use BatchCapabilityUpdater with 50ms window to batch multiple capability updates.

sdk3.title: Safe Logger for Utilities
sdk3.description: Use createSafeLogger() in lib/ utilities instead of console.log fallbacks.

sdk3.title: this.homey.setTimeout/setInterval
sdk3.description: Use Homey SDK timers, not global setTimeout/setInterval in device code.

sdk3.title: assertZCLNode Guard
sdk3.description: Call assertZCLNode(zclNode) in onNodeInit for Zigbee devices.

sdk3.title: Deferred Heavy Initialization
sdk3.description: Defer non-critical init to avoid blocking device startup.

sdk3.title: registerMultipleCapabilities
sdk3.description: Use registerMultipleCapabilities for lights and multi-capability devices.

sdk3.title: onEndDeviceAnnounce Re-configuration
sdk3.description: Re-configure attribute reporting when battery devices wake up.

sdk3.title: ConnectionStateTracker for WiFi
sdk3.description: Track connection state for WiFi devices with history and uptime stats.

sdk3.title: RetryWithBackoff for Critical Ops
sdk3.description: Use RetryWithBackoff.forDevice() for DP queries and ZCL reads.

sdk3.title: ConnectionState Persistence
sdk3.description: Persist connection stats via toJSON()/fromJSON() for diagnostics.

sdk3.title: Connection Uptime Monitoring
sdk3.description: Monitor uptime percentage and excessive reconnects.

sdk3.title: ErrorClassifier Integration
sdk3.description: Use readAttrCatch() to wrap cluster attribute listeners and classify() for retry decisions.

sdk3.title: CrashPrevention Utilities
sdk3.description: Use CrashPrevention for all async operations: safeAsync, safePromise, guardDestroyed, safeTimeout, safeInterval, safeCleanup, safeSetCapability, safeTriggerFlow, safeSendCommand, withRetry.

sdk3.title: Presence Confidence Scoring
sdk3.description: Use PresenceConfidenceScorer for multi-factor presence detection. Bayesian scoring with temporal decay.

sdk3.title: Battery Health Intelligence
sdk3.description: Use BatteryHealthIntelligence for long-term degradation tracking and predictive replacement alerts.

sdk3.title: Device Group Management
sdk3.description: Use DeviceGroupManager for coordinated multi-device actions with synchronized command execution.

sdk3.title: Advanced Flow Conditions
sdk3.description: Use AdvancedMultiConditionFlows for multi-device AND/OR/NOT conditions with time-based constraints.

sdk3.title: Diagnostic Report Export
sdk3.description: Use DiagnosticReportExport for shareable diagnostic reports with network topology and battery history.

sdk3.title: Network Topology Awareness
sdk3.description: Use NetworkTopologyTrigger for flow triggers based on Zigbee mesh health and router availability.

sdk3.title: Predictive Health Engine
sdk3.description: Use PredictiveHealthEngine for proactive device health monitoring and failure prediction.

sdk3.title: Energy History Store
sdk3.description: Use EnergyHistoryStore for persistent energy consumption tracking with historical data.

sdk3.title: Signal Triangulation for Presence
sdk3.description: Use SignalTriangulation for location-aware presence detection using Zigbee signal strength.

sdk3.title: Room Signal Aggregation
sdk3.description: Use RoomSignalAggregator for room-level presence consolidation from multiple sensors.

sdk3.title: Schedule Manager
sdk3.description: Use ScheduleManager for cron-like device scheduling with holiday awareness.

sdk3.title: Transition Engine
sdk3.description: Use TransitionEngine for smooth capability value transitions (e.g., gradual dimming).

sdk3.title: Solar Elevation Calculations
sdk3.description: Use SolarElevation for sun-position-based automation triggers.

sdk3.title: Tariff Calculator
sdk3.description: Use TariffCalculator for time-of-use energy cost calculations.

sdk3.title: Configuration Backup/Restore
sdk3.description: Use ConfigurationBackupRestore for device settings backup and restore across migrations.

sdk3.title: Battery Hybrid Manager
sdk3.description: Use BatteryHybridManager for devices with both battery and mains power sources.

antiPatterns.fix: Filter out empty arrays; causes AggregateError
Use SmartDivisorManager; don't divide in both parser and mappings
Check cover profile for positionInvert quirk

mandatory: Settings keys: zb_model_id, zb_manufacturer_name (snake_case with zb_ prefix)
Flow card IDs must be globally unique across ALL drivers
Import paths from lib/tuya/ not lib/ directly
CaseInsensitiveMatcher for all manufacturer name comparisons
Multi-DP frames: always use parseMultiple(), never assume one frame = one DP
Presence detection: use PresenceConfidenceScorer for multi-factor scoring
Battery health: use BatteryHealthIntelligence for degradation tracking
Device groups: use DeviceGroupManager for coordinated actions
naming: Settings: zb_model_id, zb_manufacturer_name (snake_case with zb_ prefix)
Driver dirs: drivers/{type}/ with device.js, driver.js, driver.compose.json
Capabilities: 156 unique - check DynamicCapabilityManager before adding new
Lib structure: lib/tuya/, lib/devices/, lib/mixins/, lib/managers/, lib/utils/, lib/clusters/, lib/presence/, lib/battery/, lib/features/, lib/groups/
security: Use GH_PAT secret for cross-repo access

crashPrevention.title: Use CrashPrevention for All Async Operations
crashPrevention.description: Wrap all async operations with CrashPrevention.safeAsync().

crashPrevention.title: Guard All Async Callbacks with _destroyed Check
crashPrevention.description: Check _destroyed flag at the start of all async callbacks.

crashPrevention.title: Use SafeTimeout and SafeInterval
crashPrevention.description: Use CrashPrevention.safeTimeout/safeInterval instead of raw setTimeout/setInterval.

crashPrevention.title: Always Cleanup Resources on Delete
crashPrevention.description: Clean up all resources in onDeleted: clearTimeout, clearInterval, safeCleanup, super.onDeleted().

crashPrevention.title: Use GuardDestroyed for Device Operations
crashPrevention.description: Guard all device operations with CrashPrevention.guardDestroyed().

crashPrevention.title: Use SafeSetCapability for Capability Updates
crashPrevention.description: Use CrashPrevention.safeSetCapability() instead of direct setCapabilityValue.

crashPrevention.title: Use SafeTriggerFlow for Flow Triggers
crashPrevention.description: Use CrashPrevention.safeTriggerFlow() instead of direct flow trigger.

crashPrevention.title: Use SafeSendCommand for Zigbee Commands
crashPrevention.description: Use CrashPrevention.safeSendCommand() instead of direct cluster command.

crashPrevention.title: Use WithRetry for Critical Operations
crashPrevention.description: Use CrashPrevention.withRetry() with maxRetries and delay for critical operations.

svgStandards.viewBox: 960x960 for Homey capability icons, 100x100 for app icon

moduleDirectories.lib/tuya/: Tuya protocol: DP parsing, time sync, sanity filtering (57 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/devices/: Device base classes: switch, sensor, cover, light, plug, thermostat (17 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/mixins/: Reusable behavior: PhysicalButton, VirtualButton, Sonoff, Thermostat (18 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/managers/: Services: SmartDivisor, DynamicCapability, Energy, IASZone, IEEE (23 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/battery/: Battery: UnifiedHandler, Calculator, Monitor, Health, Hybrid (13 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/clusters/: ZCL clusters: OnOff, LevelControl, Tuya, ZosungIR (28 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/features/: Features: Flows, Conditions, Energy, Topology, Backup (19 files)
moduleDirectories.lib/registry/: Device profiles: switches, sensors, covers, lights, plugs, thermostats (8 files)

patterns.fix: Add if (this._destroyed) return; at start of callback
Use SmartDivisorManager; set dpMappings divisor to 1
Use positionInvert: true in cover profile
Use robust device profiles from DeviceProfileRegistry

patterns.pattern: TCP connection leak on WiFi delete
patterns.fix: Ensure all WiFi devices call await super.onDeleted()
Add exponential backoff with max retries

patterns.rootCause: Single-sensor presence detection without confidence scoring
Linear battery formula without degradation tracking
patterns.fix: Use BatteryHealthIntelligence with capacity fade detection

z2mPatterns.tuyaUtils: Centralized DP type definitions, data point parsing
